measurements.label: CLOSET
measurements.notes: The closet is a narrow pass-through between the hall/pantry area and the bath suite. Width taken from the 10'-6 1/2" horizontal callout directly under the closet label. Depth is harder to read—used the 4'-1" vertical callout near the closet/hall area as the closet's short dimension. The first-pass geometric estimate of 24 sqft suggests the closet may be narrower (~5-6 ft wide × 4 ft deep), but the printed callout for that segment reads 10'-6 1/2", which spans the full closet length including the entry vestibule. Confidence reduced due to ambiguity between closet-only vs. closet+adjacent space dimensions.

measurements.label: LAUNDRY
measurements.notes: The laundry room appears as a narrow space between the closet suite and the exterior wall. The vertical 7'-11" callout aligns with the laundry's long axis (north-south). The width is not explicitly callout-labeled for the laundry alone; based on visible geometry and the adjacent 5' callout on the south wall, I estimated ~5 ft width. Floor area ~40 sqft. Perimeter ≈ 25.84 ft × 9 ft × 0.93 = 216 sqft of wall.

measurements.label: GARAGE
measurements.notes: Garage overall dimensions read from right-side and bottom callouts: 19'-10\" deep (right side, between gridlines F and lower garage wall) × 42'-0\" total span isn't garage alone. Garage width derived from bottom callouts: 2'-6\" + 6' + 14' + 6' + 2'-6\" ≈ 31', but the garage interior between the side walls aligns with the 14' centered door plus flanking 6' walls — overall outer width ~31'. However, the garage proper (inside the wall recesses) is closer to 19'-10\" wide × 42' long along the right side. Using 42' length (right edge full callout) × 19'-10\" depth doesn't match a typical garage. Best interpretation: garage is 42' long (vertical on plan, along right wall: 7'-8\" + 11'-1\" + 19'-10\" segments sum near 42') × ~19'-10\" wide. Floor area ≈ 19.83 × 42 = 833 sqft. This is a large 3-car deep garage, consistent with the plan showing a long rectangular garage to the right.

Width taken from horizontal callout 10'-1" spanning the room's interior width. Height taken from vertical callout 8'-7 1/2" along its east wall. Adjacent 4'-1" + 4'-1" verticals roughly add to ~8'-2" with wall thickness, consistent. Perimeter ~37.4 ft × 9 ft × 0.93 ≈ 313 sf wall area.

"2880" is a door tag (2'-8" x 8'-0" door) marking the entry to a small Wine alcove/closet between the Entry and Kitchen. The printed callout 4'-4" directly under it gives the width along the south wall. Depth is not printed; estimated ~4 ft from scaled geometry of the alcove. Floor area ≈ 4.33 × 4 = 17.3 sf. Perimeter ≈ 16.66 ft × 9 ft × 0.93 ≈ 139 sf wall area.

The crop label "11 11" appears to point to the Bedroom Suite area. The 16' overall callout at the top (sum of 4'-4", 3'-8", 3'-8", 4'-4") gives the room width along grid 6-9, and 12'-9 1/2" gives the depth. Wall area = (16+12.79)*2*9*0.93 ≈ 482 sf. Window count estimated from window symbols on top wall (3 mulled units); 1 door visible into the suite.

The label "10 10" appears to refer to grid line callout "10" (a column/grid bubble at the bottom of the plan), not an actual enclosed room. The crop shows the lower exterior wall of a building with grid bubbles 7, 8, 10, 12, 13 and S5 along the bottom — these are structural grid references, not a room. No enclosed room exists at this location; the dimensions shown (3'-10", 3'-2", 3'-2", 3'-10" / 2'-6", 6', 14', 6') are window/wall segment dimensions along the exterior wall. Unable to report meaningful room dimensions.

The label "12 12" at the center of the crop refers to a grid line callout / column marker (circles labeled 12 and 13 along the bottom dimension string), not a room. The center of the crop falls outside the building envelope (below the exterior wall) in an exterior dimension string area. No enclosed room exists at this label position, so no room dimensions can be reported.

The "13" label is a dimension/grid marker bubble (circled number) along the bottom edge of the floor plan, not a room label. It marks a column/grid line position, not an enclosed room. Surrounding callouts (3'-10", 3'-2", 6', 14', etc.) are window/wall segment dimensions along the building's south facade. No room can be measured from this label.

measurements.label: DECK
measurements.notes: The DECK appears to span the upper portion of the plan. The top dimension string shows the deck width as 39' (between gridlines 4 and 6, with overall 39'-7"). The 14' callout along the top represents the deck's depth (north-south dimension). Using 39' x 14' = 546 sqft. The deck is an exterior space — ceiling height set to 9' as a nominal value for wall area calculation, but decks typically have no walls to paint; wall_area should be treated cautiously.

measurements.label: BEDROOM SUITE
measurements.notes: Bedroom Suite width along the top wall reads 12'-9 1/2" (callout #4). The room depth is inferred from the vertical chain on the right side: combining 8'-6 1/4" (visible upper segment) and 4'-1" partition leg, the room measures roughly 12'-9" deep as well, with the office/dining nook (8'-7 1/2" deep) along the left. Used 12'-9 1/2" × 12'-9 1/2" as the overall bedroom footprint based on the printed callouts that bracket this room. One door from hall, three windows along exterior top wall (the 4'-4", 3'-8", 3'-8", 4'-4" callouts indicate window pier spacing).

measurements.label: BATH SUITE
measurements.notes: Bath Suite spans from the bath/closet wall on the west to the toilet/exterior wall on the east. Width derived from the 13' callout (north wall, vanity area) noted on the plan; depth derived from the 8'-9 1/2" callout (south wall, shower/bench segment) which represents the room's interior dimension between west wall and the toilet partition. The room is L-shaped/irregular with a tub alcove extending east; using the main rectangular footprint of 13' × 8'-9 1/2". Wall area uses perimeter of ~43.6 ft × 9 ft × 0.93.

measurements.label: PANTRY
measurements.notes: Pantry width is given as 8'-0" (horizontal callout directly under PANTRY label). Depth is not directly called out; estimated at ~4.5 ft based on the surrounding 8'-7 1/2" vertical callout being for an adjacent space. Width is from printed dimension; depth is scaled/estimated.

measurements.label: BEDROOM 2
measurements.notes: Bedroom 2 width along the bottom appears to span the 2'+2'+4'-5'+3'-2" segments = ~11'-7" along the south wall before the entry door. Vertical (north-south) callouts on the left side show 2'-6" + 4'-6" + (2'-10"+2'-2"+2'-2"+2'-4") + 5'-3" stack; the room's depth (left wall) reads 4'-6" + 2'-6" ≈ 7' plus the window bay ~2'-4" — using overall ~9'-6" depth. With width ≈ 12'-11" (2+2+4'-5"+3'-2"+door area) and depth ≈ 9'-6", area ≈ 122 sf. Some ambiguity due to L-shape and missing single overall callout, so confidence moderate.

measurements.label: BEDROOM 3
measurements.notes: Bedroom 3 occupies the top section of the wing. Width along the top reads 12' (from chained dims 2'-9" + 4'-2" + 3'-8" + 4'-2" ≈ 14.75' but the gridline-to-gridline callout shows 12' between grids 2 and 4 which corresponds to the room's interior width). Depth along grid A-B is 8' per the vertical callout. So approximate room footprint = 12' × 8' = 96 sf.
